query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS withdrawal_settlements (
  id VARCHAR(36) PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT (UUID()),
  batch_id VARCHAR(100) UNIQUE,
  status VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  total_withdrawals INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  total_amount DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  successful_count INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  failed_count INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  mtn_batch_id VARCHAR(100),
  mtn_status VARCHAR(50),
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
  completed_at TIMESTAMP NULL,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW() ON UPDATE NOW(),
  notes TEXT,
  admin_id INT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS withdrawal_settlements (
  id VARCHAR(36) PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT (UUID()),
  batch_id VARCHAR(100) UNIQUE,
  status VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  total_withdrawals INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  total_amount DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  successful_count INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  failed_count INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  mtn_batch_id VARCHAR(100),
  mtn_status VARCHAR(50),
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
  completed_at TIMESTAMP NULL,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW() ON UPDATE NOW(),
  notes TEXT,
  admin_id INT NULL
);
